entries.text: Weapon slots in the build planner: primary, secondary, sidearm (pistol/knife), and grenade with ammo selection and combined weapon stats.
Weapon comparison selector to choose which equipped weapon to compare against when browsing inventory.
Sort inventory items by name or type in the build planner.
Toggle visibility of gear and weapon stats independently in the statistics panel.
Build planner now shows your total carry capacity, combining base carry weight with equipment bonuses.
Release notes page with a notification badge when new updates are available.
Ammo tiles now show cost per pack and cost per round.
Improved language picker with a cleaner dropdown design.
Compare equipped items against inventory items in the build planner to see which is better.
Build planner for planning and comparing loadouts with combined stats, weight, and protection breakdowns.
Initial release of Stalker Gamma Database.
